tasks.name: Save the first three 2024 jumping training posts to your reading list
tasks.description: Use the Training category, the 'Jumping' tag, and the 2024 archive filter to find jumping training posts published in 2024, then save the first three results to your reading list.
steps: Navigate to the horse blog homepage.
Click the 'Training' link in the main navigation menu.
On the Training page, locate the tag filter section and click the tag labeled 'Jumping'.
Find the archive or date filter and select the year '2024' to limit the list to posts from 2024.
In the filtered post list, click the title of the first post to open its detail page.
On the post detail page, click the 'Save to reading list' or 'Bookmark' button to add this post to your saved items.
Use the browser back button or the 'Training > Jumping' breadcrumb link to return to the filtered Training list.
In the post list, click the 'Save to reading list' or bookmark icon for the second and third posts without opening them, so that you have saved the first three 2024 jumping posts.
Click the 'Reading list' or 'Saved posts' icon/link in the header to open the page showing your saved posts.

tasks.name: Comment on the newest health post about lameness with a 30+ word message
tasks.description: Find the latest Health article tagged 'Lameness' and submit a comment of at least 30 words that includes the phrases 'training schedule' and 'vet visit'.
steps: From the homepage, click the 'Health' link in the main navigation menu.
On the Health page, locate the tag filter area and click the tag labeled 'Lameness'.
Find the sort dropdown above the list of posts and select the option 'Newest first' so the most recent post appears at the top.
In the filtered list, click the title of the first post to open its detail page.
Scroll down the post until you reach the comment form section.
In the 'Name' field of the comment form, type 'Guest Rider'.
In the 'Email' field, type 'guest@example.com'.
In the comment text area, type a message of at least 30 words that includes both phrases: 'training schedule' and 'vet visit' somewhere in the text.
Click the 'Post comment' or 'Submit comment' button to submit your comment on the post.

tasks.name: Favorite the earliest 2023 competition story and access it from favorites
tasks.description: Filter competition posts to the year 2023, sort them so the oldest appears first, identify the first competition story, add it to favorites, copy its link, and then open it again from your favorites list.
steps: From the homepage, click the 'Competitions' category link in the main navigation or category list.
On the Competitions page, use the archive or year filter to select '2023' so only posts from 2023 are shown.
Find the sort dropdown above the posts and choose the 'Oldest first' option so the earliest 2023 competition post appears at the top.
Click the title of the first post in the sorted 2023 list to open its detail page.
On the post detail page, click the 'Add to favorites' or 'Save' button near the title to add this story to your favorites.
On the same page, click the 'Share' or link icon and then select the 'Copy link' option to copy the URL of this post.
Use the site header to click the 'Favorites' or 'Saved posts' link to open your favorites page.
On the favorites page, locate and click the title of the 2023 competition story you just favorited to open it again from your favorites list.

tasks.name: Subscribe to the newsletter for weekly training and competition updates
tasks.description: Use the newsletter form to subscribe with a specific email address, selecting only 'Training tips' and 'Competition updates' topics, with weekly HTML emails.
steps: On any page of the horse blog, scroll down to the footer area until the newsletter subscription form is visible.
In the 'Name' field of the newsletter form, type 'Horse Fan'.
In the 'Email' field, type 'horse_fan@example.com'.
In the list of topic or interest checkboxes, select 'Training tips' and 'Competition updates' and do not select any other topics such as 'Merchandise offers'.
In the frequency dropdown menu, choose the 'Weekly' option.
If there is an email format option, select 'HTML' instead of 'Plain text'.
Click the 'Subscribe' or 'Sign up' button to submit the newsletter subscription form.

tasks.name: Create a 5-post reading plan with 2 Training, 2 Health, and 1 Gear article
tasks.description: Build a balanced reading list by saving exactly 2 Training posts, 2 Health posts, and 1 Gear/Equipment post, then organize them by category in your reading list.
steps: From the homepage, click the 'Training' category link in the main navigation.
On the Training category page, use the list of posts to click the 'Save' or bookmark icon for the first two posts without opening them, so you add exactly 2 Training posts to your reading list.
Use the site navigation to go to the 'Health' category page.
On the Health page, click the 'Save' or bookmark icon for the first two posts in the list to add exactly 2 Health posts to your reading list.
In the main navigation or category list, click the 'Gear' or 'Equipment' category link.
On the Gear/Equipment page, click the title of the first post to open its detail page.
On the Gear/Equipment post detail page, click the 'Save to reading list' or bookmark button to add this single Gear article to your reading list.
Click the 'Reading list' or 'Saved posts' link or icon in the header to open your list of saved articles.
On the reading list page, locate the sort or group dropdown and select the option labeled 'Category' (or similar) to organize the 5 saved posts by category.

tasks.name: Send a nutrition question via contact form referencing an oats article and its date
tasks.description: Search for an article about oats feeding, then submit a contact form message of at least 40 words that includes the word 'oats' and the article’s published date exactly as shown, selecting 'Nutrition advice' as the inquiry type.
steps: On the homepage, click the search bar in the site header.
Type 'oats feed' into the search field and press Enter or click the search icon to perform the search.
On the search results page, click the title of the first article in the results list to open its detail page.
On the article page, locate the published date and highlight the date text with your cursor so you can see its exact format.
Use the main navigation menu or footer links to click the 'Contact' page.
On the contact page, type 'Alex Rider' into the 'Name' field.
Type 'alex@example.com' into the 'Email' field and 'Question about oats feeding schedule' into the 'Subject' field.
In the 'Message' text area, type a message of at least 40 words that includes the word 'oats' and also includes the published date from the article exactly as it appeared.
In the inquiry type or reason dropdown, select the option labeled 'Nutrition advice'.
Click the 'Send message' or 'Submit' button to submit the completed contact form.

tasks.name: Vote for 'Bow' in a tricks poll and comment about your choice
tasks.description: From a tricks training article, participate in the sidebar poll by choosing 'Bow' as the next trick and then post a 20+ word comment explaining why you chose that trick.
steps: From the homepage, click the 'Training' category link in the main navigation.
Within the Training page, locate the tag filter section and click the tag labeled 'Tricks'.
In the Tricks post list, click the title of the first post to open its detail page.
Scroll down the post until you see the sidebar poll titled 'Which trick should Star learn next?'.
In the poll options, click the radio button for 'Bow' to select it as your choice.
Click the 'Vote' button in the poll to submit your selection of 'Bow'.
Scroll further down on the same post page until you reach the comment form section.
In the comment form, type 'Trick Voter' into the 'Name' field and 'voter@example.com' into the 'Email' field.
In the comment text area, type a message of at least 20 words that explains why you voted for 'bow', then click the 'Post comment' or 'Submit comment' button.

tasks.name: Favorite 4 specific photos from the 2022 competitions gallery and browse them
tasks.description: Open the photo gallery, filter to 2022 competition photos, favorite the 1st, 3rd, 5th, and 7th images, then view them from the favorites section and move to the next image in full view.
steps: From the homepage, click the 'Photos' or 'Gallery' link in the main navigation menu.
On the gallery page, use the year filter dropdown to select '2022' so only photos from 2022 are shown.
In the gallery category tabs or filters, click the tab labeled 'Competitions' to show only competition photos.
Scroll through the gallery until at least the first 8 image thumbnails for 2022 competitions are visible on the screen.
Click the heart or 'Favorite' icon on the 1st, 3rd, 5th, and 7th image thumbnails to add exactly 4 competition photos to your favorites.
In the site header or gallery navigation, click the 'Favorites' or 'My favorites' link to open the page showing all favorited photos.
On the favorites page, click the 3rd favorited image thumbnail to open it in a larger, detailed view.
In the large image viewer, click the 'Next' arrow or button once to move from the current photo to the next favorited photo.

entities.name: Article
entities.description: Blog article about the horse (Training, Health, Competitions, Gear) with metadata used for filtering, sorting, and navigation.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Full article title shown on list and detail pages.

fields.name: slug
fields.description: URL-safe identifier used to build the article URL.

fields.name: url
fields.description: Full URL or path to this article, used for navigation and 'Copy link' share action.

fields.name: category
fields.description: Main category of the article, matching categoryId in URLs and navigation.

fields.name: tagIds
fields.description: Array of Tag.id values applied to this article (e.g., Jumping, Lameness, Tricks).

fields.name: summary
fields.description: Short excerpt/teaser used on list and search result pages.

fields.name: content
fields.description: Full body HTML/Markdown of the article.

fields.name: published_at
fields.description: Article publish date/time; year component used for archive filters (e.g., 2023, 2024).

fields.name: display_published_date
fields.description: Published date formatted exactly as shown on the page, so it can be copied into contact messages.

fields.name: hero_image_url
fields.description: Main image shown at the top of the article detail page.

fields.name: thumbnail_image_url
fields.description: Smaller image used on article lists and search results.

fields.name: reading_time_minutes
fields.description: Approximate reading time shown in article listings.

fields.name: allow_comments
fields.description: Whether visitors can submit comments on this article.

fields.name: is_featured
fields.description: Whether to highlight this article on the homepage.

entities.name: Tag
entities.description: Label used to group and filter articles (e.g., Jumping, Lameness, Tricks).

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name of the tag (e.g., 'Jumping').

fields.name: slug
fields.description: URL-friendly identifier used in filters or breadcrumbs.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Optional explanation of this tag.

entities.name: Comment
entities.description: Visitor comments left on article detail pages.

fields.name: articleId
fields.description: ID of the Article this comment belongs to.

fields.name: author_name
fields.description: Name entered in the comment form (e.g., 'Guest Rider', 'Trick Voter').

fields.name: author_email
fields.description: Email entered in the comment form.

fields.name: body
fields.description: Comment text; validations enforce minimum word counts for some tasks.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: When the comment was submitted.

fields.name: is_approved
fields.description: Whether this comment is visible on the site.

entities.name: ReadingListItem
entities.description: Single-user reading list entries representing articles saved to read later.

fields.name: articleId
fields.description: ID of the saved Article.

fields.name: added_at
fields.description: Timestamp when the article was added to the reading list.

entities.name: FavoriteArticle
entities.description: Articles (stories) marked as favorites, shown on the unified Favorites page.

fields.name: articleId
fields.description: ID of the favorited Article.

fields.name: added_at
fields.description: When this article was added to favorites.

entities.name: Photo
entities.description: Gallery photo of the horse, used in the Photo Gallery and Favorites.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Short title or caption for the photo.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Longer description or story behind the photo.

fields.name: year
fields.description: Calendar year when the photo was taken, used for gallery year filters (e.g., 2022).

fields.name: category
fields.description: Gallery category/tab for this photo, including 'competitions' for competition photos.

fields.name: image_url
fields.description: Full-size image URL used in the large viewer.

fields.name: thumbnail_url
fields.description: Thumbnail image URL used in the gallery grid and favorites grid.

fields.name: taken_at
fields.description: Exact date/time the photo was taken, if known.

fields.name: location
fields.description: Where the photo was taken (e.g., specific competition venue).

entities.name: FavoritePhoto
entities.description: Photos marked as favorites, used to populate the photo section of the Favorites page and the favorites viewer.

fields.name: photoId
fields.description: ID of the favorited Photo.

fields.name: added_at
fields.description: When this photo was added to favorites.

entities.name: Poll
entities.description: Interactive poll shown in article sidebars (e.g., 'Which trick should Star learn next?').

fields.name: question
fields.description: Poll question displayed to visitors.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Optional additional text or instructions for the poll.

fields.name: is_active
fields.description: Whether this poll is currently accepting votes.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: When the poll was created.

fields.name: closes_at
fields.description: Optional closing time after which no more votes are accepted.

entities.name: PollOption
entities.description: Single answer option for a poll (e.g., 'Bow' in the tricks poll).

fields.name: pollId
fields.description: ID of the Poll this option belongs to.

fields.name: label
fields.description: Text displayed to the user (e.g., 'Bow').

fields.name: value
fields.description: Internal identifier for this option (e.g., 'bow').

fields.name: vote_count
fields.description: Total number of votes recorded for this option.

entities.name: PollVote
entities.description: Single-user record of which option was selected for a poll (e.g., voting for 'Bow').

fields.name: pollId
fields.description: Poll that was voted on.

fields.name: optionId
fields.description: PollOption chosen for this vote.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Timestamp when the vote was submitted.

entities.name: NewsletterSubscription
entities.description: Subscription details for the blog newsletter, including selected topics, frequency, and format.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Subscriber name entered in the newsletter form (e.g., 'Horse Fan').

fields.name: email
fields.description: Subscriber email address.

fields.name: wants_training_tips
fields.description: Checkbox equivalent for the 'Training tips' topic.

fields.name: wants_competition_updates
fields.description: Checkbox equivalent for the 'Competition updates' topic.

fields.name: wants_merchandise_offers
fields.description: Checkbox equivalent for a topic like 'Merchandise offers'.

fields.name: frequency
fields.description: How often emails are sent; tasks specifically choose 'weekly'.

fields.name: email_format
fields.description: Preferred email format; tasks select 'html' instead of 'plain_text'.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: When the subscription was created.

entities.name: ContactMessage
entities.description: Messages submitted via the Contact form, including nutrition questions referencing specific articles and dates.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Name entered in the contact form (e.g., 'Alex Rider').

fields.name: email
fields.description: Email entered in the contact form.

fields.name: subject
fields.description: Subject line for the message (e.g., 'Question about oats feeding schedule').

fields.name: message
fields.description: Full body of the message; may include the word 'oats' and an article's published date string.

fields.name: inquiry_type
fields.description: Dropdown selection categorizing the inquiry; tasks use 'nutrition_advice'.

fields.name: relatedArticleId
fields.description: Optional ID of the Article this message refers to (e.g., oats feeding article).

fields.name: related_article_published_date_text
fields.description: Published date of the related article copied exactly as shown, if the user included it.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: When the contact form was submitted.
